They can navigate to Organization settings > Organization to make the necessary changes.

Issue: i can not able to see apply tab
Subject: I need to practice, submissions not working
Response: To access the 'Apply' tab, ensure you have installed QuickApply on your browser. If you have installed it on one browser and switched to another, a reminder will appear in the 'Apply' tab, prompting you to install QuickApply on the new browser. Please install QuickApply and try again.

Issue: none of the submissions across any challenges are working on your website
Subject: Issue while taking the test
Response: If your submissions are not working across any challenges, try the following steps: 1. Close the challenge window, then reopen it using the same challenge link. 2. Open the challenge in another supported browser, such as the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, or Edge, for full compatibility. 3. Ensure your internet connection is stable. If the issue persists, contact HackerRank support at help@hackerrank.com for further assistance.

Issue: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check all the criterias are matching other than zoom  connectivity. Due to which i am unable to take the test. I have done all through my way by  changing the settings and system configurations but still showing error
Subject: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check
Response: To resolve the compatibility check issue with Zoom connectivity, ensure that your system meets the technical requirements for network stability, supported operating systems, and supported browsers. Also, check that you have granted the necessary permissions, including webcam access, screen sharing access, and full-screen mode. If the issue persists, try restarting your system or checking your internet connection. Note that Proctor Mode requires a stable internet connection and may not work with certain network configurations or firewall settings.

Issue: I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company 'Company Name' HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances  that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time. I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could  provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment. Thank you for your understanding and support.
Subject: nan
Response: To reschedule an interview, you can follow these steps: Log in to your HackerRank for Work account, go to the Interviews > Interview List, click the interview you want to reschedule, click Invite Participants, update the date, time, and other fields as needed, and then click Save and Send Email. However, since you are a candidate and not an interviewer, you should contact the company's recruiter or the person who scheduled the interview to request a reschedule. They can assist you with rescheduling the assessment.

Issue: Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name.  Can you let me know how to do this?
Subject: How to Remove a User
Response: To remove a user from an interview template, go to the Share Interview Template dialog box, select the user or team you want to remove, and then select 'Remove User' from the drop-down menu. Finally, click 'Confirm' in the confirmation dialog box.

Issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
Subject: Subscription pause
Response: To pause your subscription, please follow these steps: Access your Subscription Settings by clicking on the profile icon in the top-right corner of the page and selecting Settings from the dropdown menu. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription. Click the Cancel Plan button, and then select the desired pause duration, which can be between 1 month and 12 months. Confirm your selection by clicking Confirm Pause. You will receive a notification confirming that your subscription has been paused and will automatically resume on the specified date.

Issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
Subject: Employee leaving the company
Response: To remove an employee from your HackerRank hiring account, you need to delete their candidate profile. Only company admins have access to delete a candidate's profile. You can do this by going to the Candidates tab, clicking on the vertical ellipsis menu on the right side of the candidate's attempt, and clicking on Visit Profile. From the candidate's profile page, click on the vertical ellipsis and select the option to delete the profile. Alternatively, if you need to delete candidate data in bulk, you can raise a request to support@hackerrank.com.

Issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
Subject: Visa card minimum spend
Response: In the US Virgin Islands, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of $10 for credit card transactions. However, this exception does not apply to debit card transactions. If you're using a debit card, the merchant should not require a minimum transaction amount. If you're using a credit card and the merchant is requiring a minimum amount greater than $10, please notify your Visa card issuer.
